reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This flag is set globally for the entire loop, but it should only affect the current '-' expansion. Also, it doesn't check if a[i+1] > a[i-1], violating the requirement that expansion only occurs when the right character is greater.]

13.reason: When flag is 1 (from a previous expansion), this condition fails, so characters after the first expansion are not printed.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Because 'flag' is not reset per '-', once a valid '-' is found, all subsequent characters (even non-expansion ones) may be mishandled. 16.reason: The loop condition uses strict less than (<), which excludes the end character. It should be less than or equal to (<=) to include the character at a[i+1]. Additionally, the logic fails to reset 'flag' to 0 after processing an expansion, causing subsequent non-expansion characters to be suppressed incorrectly.
